problems.title: Pulsar Pipeline: Transient Candidate Vetting
problems.description: A radio telescope flags thousands of candidate detections summarized by five engineered features. Out of 2000 archived candidates only 26 are labelled (genuine transient vs RFI); the rest are unlabelled. Build a classifier that exploits the latent structure of the unlabelled data and predict labels for two held-out runs. Metric: macro-averaged F1.

problems.title: IOAI 2025 — Antique (Individual Contest)
problems.description: The Antique problem from the IOAI 2025 Individual Contest held in Beijing, China. Work the baseline, then compare against the worked solution.

problems.title: Titanic — Machine Learning from Disaster (example)
problems.description: The canonical Kaggle starter competition. A good first end-to-end submission. *(Example of a fully link-based problem — delete it from Manage Content if you don't want it.)*
